---
name: 💡 Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement, triage
assignees: ''
---

## Summary
<!-- A brief, one-sentence description of the feature you'd like. -->

## Problem / Motivation
<!-- What problem does this solve? What's the current pain point or limitation? -->

## Proposed Solution
<!-- Describe the feature or improvement you have in mind. -->

## Alternatives Considered
<!-- Have you tried any workarounds? Are there other approaches that could solve this? -->

## Use Case
<!-- Who would benefit from this? How would you use it day-to-day? -->

## Additional Context
<!-- Any mockups, examples from other tools, or supporting materials. -->
